creator: matthias.andree@gmx.de
text:
Greetings,

this looks to me as though ruby-bdb used interfaces that do not exist in
db43 but were added in db44.

Please reassign this bug to databases/ruby-bdb and ask its maintainer for
assistance. If ruby-bdb actually requires these interfaces, adjust ruby-bdb
so it depends on db44 or newer. Thanks.

HTH

Best regards
Matthias
